Closes #

## Component definition of done

- [ ] Read and followed [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).
- [ ] Every relevant interaction state implemented or marked `not applicable`.
- [ ] Keyboard + touch parity; correct ARIA; visible, unobscured focus.
- [ ] Light/dark, reduced motion, forced colors, RTL, 200–400% zoom verified.
- [ ] Tokens only — no hard-coded colors or sizes.
- [ ] Render test added/updated in `test/aurora_ui/`.
- [ ] `mix check` passes locally.

## Public API

- [ ] No public API change, **or** I completed the API-change review template in
      `docs/api-inventory.md` and updated the changelog.
- [ ] Docs updated (component page + component-matrix row).
